ddls:
CREATE TABLE "liquidity_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity pool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the liquidity pool */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the liquidity pool on the blockchain */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of liquidity pool (e.g., sAMM, vAMM) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pool (e.g., active, inactive, paused) */,
  "total_liquidity" TEXT /* Total liquidity in the pool */,
  "apy" TEXT /* Annual percentage yield (APY) of the pool */,
  "blockchain_network" TEXT /* Blockchain network the pool is deployed on (e.g., Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain) */,
  "token_pair" TEXT /* Token pair the pool is for (e.g., USDT/FITFI) */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee percentage for the pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pool was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_pools_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gauges" (
  "gauge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gauge */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool the gauge belongs to */,
  "gauge_address" TEXT /* Address of the gauge on the blockchain */,
  "gauge_type" TEXT /* Type of gauge (e.g., reward, penalty) */,
  "reward_token" TEXT /* Token used for rewards */,
  "reward_amount" TEXT /* Amount of reward tokens */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the gauge */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the gauge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gauge was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the gauge was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gauge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gauge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gauges_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gauges_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bribe_addresses" (
  "bribe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bribe address */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool the bribe address belongs to */,
  "bribe_address" TEXT /* Address of the bribe on the blockchain */,
  "bribe_type" TEXT /* Type of bribe (e.g., reward, penalty) */,
  "bribe_token" TEXT /* Token used for bribes */,
  "bribe_amount" TEXT /* Amount of bribe tokens */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the bribe */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the bribe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bribe address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bribe address was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bribe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bribe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bribe_addresses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bribe_addresses_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction on the blockchain */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number of the transaction on the blockchain */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdraw, swap) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount involved in the transaction */,
  "token" TEXT /* Token involved in the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address of the sender */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, liquidity provider) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_pools" (
  "user_pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-pool relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the liquidity pool */,
  "stake_amount" TEXT /* Amount of liquidity staked by the user */,
  "stake_time" TEXT /* Time the user staked the liquidity */,
  "unstake_time" TEXT /* Time the user unstaked the liquidity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's stake is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_pools_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_pools_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("pool_id") REFERENCES liquidity_pools ("pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., pool update, transaction, security) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
